channel.title: Hyprland on Elis Hirwing
channel.description: Recent content in Hyprland on Elis Hirwing

item.title: Switching from Sway to Hyprland
item.description: Introduction After four years with Sway, I’ve decided to transition to Hyprland. My journey from EXWM to Sway began about four years ago, and I documented the experience in this post three years ago. While Sway has served me well, it has its limitations that I’ve used hacks and workarounds to circumvent. The Limitations of Sway One major drawback of Sway is its screen sharing capabilities. Although I managed to get screen sharing somewhat functional, it only allows sharing the full screen.
